---
title: "cortex.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\expansion_test_new\.agents\scripts\engine\cortex.py"
loc: 36
complexity: 7
logic_score: 2.42
style_score: 3.87
intel_score: 3.62
overall_score: 2.62
---

## Intent
The `cortex.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on Cortex, __init__, _ingest, query. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via Cortex, __init__, _ingest, query. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)

### Exports
- `Cortex`
- `__init__`
- `_ingest`
- `query`
